HGSS.572.0000:
I don’t remember the last time
someone came to visit me.\f
When I was young, I was a
Pokémon Trainer, too. I tried to reach\r
the tower and dive into the ocean.\f
I put a lot of effort into many things.
Well, I take things easy now, listening\r
to the waves and winds on this beach.
HGSS.572.0001:
Have you heard of the Bell Tower
in Ecruteak?\f
There are what they call Clear Bells
on top of the tower.\f
They don’t make a single noise
in strong winds.\f
There is only one way to make them ring.\f
It is to obtain another Clear Bell just
like the ones at the top of the tower.\r
I went after it when I was young.\r
But I never got one...
HGSS.572.0002:
Have you heard of Whirl Islands?\f
There are what they call Tidal Bells
at its waterfall basin.\f
They don’t make a single noise
in crashing waves.\f
There is only one way to make them ring.\f
It is to obtain another Tidal Bell just
like the ones at the waterfall basin.\r
I went after it when I was young.\r
But I never got one...
HGSS.572.0003:
Oh! You’ve managed to get a Clear Bell?\f
The old-time dream of mine...
I see...\r
You’ve done it...\f
...
...I can hear it!\f
The chime of the bells on the wind
coming from the direction of\r
the Bell Tower...
HGSS.572.0004:
Oh! You’ve managed to get a Tidal Bell?\f
The old-time dream of mine...
I see...\r
You’ve done it...\f
...
...I can hear it!\f
The chime of the bells on the sea
breeze coming from the direction of\r
the Whirl Islands...
